description: Markdown-to-deck composer with a six-template gallery and a single-file HTML export. Type markdown on the left, watch the slide deck render live on the right, ship the resulting deck as one portable .html file.
features: Six hand-built slide templates: Minimalist, Terminal, Magazine, Gradient, Paper grid, and Council Signal (household house style)
Live iframe preview with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, click left/right edge) and page counter
Markdown editor with --- slide breaks and # / ## titles — matches the existing content-to-slides skill convention
Single-file portable HTML export — embedded CSS + JS, zero dependencies, works offline
Pre-seeded with a real Wilson household excerpt so the gallery preview is meaningful on first load
localStorage persistence for markdown, title, and active template
